content: Pipecat turn detection: Silero VAD (stop_secs is the primary endpointing knob; production examples use 0.2-0.8s) plus optional SmartTurnAnalyzer (smart-turn v3 model) that classifies turn complete/incomplete from last 8s of audio when VAD pauses, with stop_secs fallback timer; distinguishes backchannels from barge-in. Interruption handling built-in: user speech during playback cancels TTS and in-flight LLM. SmartTurnParams: stop_secs (default 3s), pre_speech_ms, max_duration_secs. Known issue: smart-turn v3 breaks at 8kHz telephony sample rate.
